name: The Back Nine Golf | Memphis, TN - Collierville
address: 3660 S Houston Levee Rd #101, Collierville, TN 38017
about: The Back Nine Golf in Memphis, TN (Collierville) is a golf simulation venue that offers an indoor experience for golfers. The venue is designed for practice and play, featuring advanced technology to simulate various golf courses. The pricing model is based on hourly bay rentals, making it accessible for individuals and groups looking to improve their game or enjoy a round of golf in a controlled environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced simulation technology for realistic play
Convenient indoor location for year-round play
Flexible pricing for individuals and groups
Availability of coaching for skill improvement
Private rooms for focused practice or events

food_and_drink.notes: On-site kitchen available for food service

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue typically provides rental clubs, but bringing your own is recommended for familiarity and comfort.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks may not be allowed, as the venue offers its own kitchen and bar services.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: An 18-hole simulation round typically takes 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and welcomes junior golfers, with options for younger players to enjoy the simulation experience.
